institution.name: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University-Gurajada, Vizianagaram
institution.theme: Employability-Driven, Inclusive, Industry-Integrated & Community-Centered Higher Education

overview.title: JNTU-GV Best Practices
overview.description: JNTU-GV is transforming higher education through industry-integrated employability ecosystems, experiential learning, multidisciplinary skilling, MSME engagement, community outreach, and sustainable development initiatives aligned with NEP 2020, SDGs, and Industry 5.0.
overview.vision: To position JNTU-GV as a national model for employability-driven, inclusive, innovation-oriented, and future-ready higher education.

bestPractices.title: Integrated Job, Industry, and MSME-Driven Employability Ecosystem
bestPractices.shortDescription: A comprehensive employability ecosystem integrating industry partnerships, MSME engagement, certification-driven skilling, and centralized career opportunities for students and unemployed youth.
objectives: Provide centralized access to jobs and internships

initiatives.title: Centralized Job & Opportunities Portal
initiatives.description: Unified digital platform providing real-time access to jobs, internships, apprenticeships, and certification-linked opportunities.

initiatives.title: Opportunity Horizon Initiative
initiatives.description: Inclusive employability outreach for MBA, MCA, M.Pharm, B.Tech, B.Pharm, B.Sc, B.Com, BCA, BBM, Diploma, and ITI students.

initiatives.title: Industry Collaborations
initiatives.description: Established 45+ MoUs with NASSCOM, EXCELR, MSME partners, NIRMAAN Organization, and Torch Fintech India Ltd.

initiatives.title: MSME Integration
initiatives.description: Hands-on industrial exposure, entrepreneurship support, and technology transfer initiatives.

initiatives.title: Certification-Driven Skilling
initiatives.description: Conducted 38 certification courses in Generative AI, AWS, Cyber Security, IoT, and Entrepreneurial Skills.

bestPractices.title: Experiential Learning, Internship, and Community Engagement Model
bestPractices.shortDescription: An experiential and innovation-driven learning framework integrating practical exposure, in-house internships, infrastructure engagement, and AI-enabled smart campus development.

initiatives.title: Campus Civil Maintenance Participation
initiatives.description: B.Tech Civil Engineering students actively participated in campus civil maintenance and infrastructure-related works.

initiatives.title: AI-Enabled Hostel Management System
initiatives.description: B.Tech IT students developed an AI-enabled Hostel Management System for smart monitoring, grievance handling, automation, and resource management.

initiatives.title: Experiential Learning-Based Programs
initiatives.description: Strengthened implementation of in-house internships and practical learning-oriented degree programs.

initiatives.title: Innovation & Smart Campus Initiatives
initiatives.description: Promoted practical application of Artificial Intelligence and automation for campus development.

bestPractices.title: Multidisciplinary, Certification-Driven, and Inclusive Skilling Framework
bestPractices.shortDescription: A multidisciplinary and future-oriented skilling framework integrating emerging technologies, legal awareness, certification programs, and inclusive learning ecosystems.
objectives: Integrate technology with legal and ethical dimensions

initiatives.title: PG Certification Programme in AI, Technology & Law
initiatives.description: Introduced an interdisciplinary postgraduate certification course integrating Artificial Intelligence, emerging technologies, legal frameworks, and ethics.

initiatives.title: Certification-Based Learning
initiatives.description: Expanded certification-driven education aligned with Industry 5.0 and future technologies.

initiatives.title: Multidisciplinary Education Framework
initiatives.description: Integrated flexible and interdisciplinary learning opportunities across academic disciplines.

bestPractices.title: Vidyanjali Community Outreach & SDG-Driven Well-Being Initiative
bestPractices.shortDescription: A community-centered outreach initiative integrating education, health awareness, environmental sustainability, and social responsibility through Vidyanjali and public engagement programs.
objectives: Promote social responsibility among students and stakeholders
Support community wellbeing and public health awareness

initiatives.title: Vidyanjali Volunteer Program
initiatives.description: Community volunteers engaged with government schools to promote health awareness, hygiene education, digital literacy, and science workshops.

initiatives.title: Career Guidance & Educational Support
initiatives.description: Conducted career guidance sessions and improved learning environments for school students.

initiatives.title: Walk with Nature Initiative
initiatives.description: Weekly JNTU-GV Health Hour initiative promoting physical fitness, mental well-being, and ecological awareness.

initiatives.title: Environmental Sustainability Activities
initiatives.description: Tree plantation drives, green campus initiatives, waste management awareness, and environmental conservation programs.

bestPractices.title: MSME-Based Community Engagement, Public Service & Nation Building
bestPractices.shortDescription: An MSME-driven community engagement model focused on entrepreneurship awareness, employability, public service, healthcare outreach, and nation-building initiatives.
objectives: Promote public service and nation building

initiatives.title: Pharmaceutical Entrepreneurship Awareness
initiatives.description: Conducted awareness programs on pharmaceutical entrepreneurship and MSME opportunities.

initiatives.title: MSME Interaction Programs
initiatives.description: Facilitated interactions with local pharmacy owners, MSME stakeholders, and manufacturers.

initiatives.title: Business Skills & Regulatory Training
initiatives.description: Training sessions on business skills, regulatory compliance, and entrepreneurial development.

initiatives.title: Health Camps & Medicine Distribution
initiatives.description: Organized free health check-up camps, medicine distribution drives, and community health awareness programs.

futureVision.title: Future Roadmap of JNTU-GV
goals: Expand collaborations to 150+ national and international MoUs
Expand global internships and certification programs
Strengthen startup incubation and innovation ecosystems
Promote inclusive skilling aligned with NEP 2020 and SDGs
